touchy that even casual reference to spiritual things made us bristle with antagonism.

abandoned.
pg48-p1-s4: Though some of us resisted, we found no great difficulty in casting aside such feelings.

Faced with alcoholic
destruction, we soon became as open minded on spiritual matters as we had tried to be on other questions.
pg48-p1-s6:
In this
respect alcohol was a great persuader.

Sometimes this was a tedious

pg48-p1:
we often found ourselves handicapped by obstinacy, sensitiveness, and unreasoning prejudice. Many of us have been so
touchy that even casual reference to spiritual things made us bristle with antagonism. This sort of thinking had to be
abandoned. Though some of us resisted, we found no great difficulty in casting aside such feelings. Faced with alcoholic
destruction, we soon became as open minded on spiritual matters as we had tried to be on other questions. In this
respect alcohol was a great persuader. It finally beat us into a state of reasonableness. Sometimes this was a tedious
process; we hope no one else will be prejudiced for as long as some of us were.
pg48-p2-s1: The reader may still ask why he should believe in a Power greater than himself.
pg48-p2-s2: We think there are good reasons.
pg48-p2-s3:
Let us
have a look at some of them.
pg48-p2:
The reader may still ask why he should believe in a Power greater than himself. We think there are good reasons. Let us
have a look at some of them.
pg48-p3-s1: The practical individual of today is a stickler for facts and results.
pg48-p3-s2:
Nevertheless, the twentieth century readily
accepts theories of all kinds, provided they are firmly grounded in fact.
pg48-p3-s3:
We have numerous theories, for example, about
electricity.
pg48-p3-s4: Everybody believes them without a murmur of doubt.
pg48-p3-s6:
Simply because it is
impossible to explain what we see, feel, direct, and use, without a reasonable assumption as a starting point.
pg48-p3:
The practical individual of today is a stickler for facts and results. Nevertheless, the twentieth century readily
accepts theories of all kinds, provided they are firmly grounded in fact. We have numerous theories, for example, about
electricity. Everybody believes them without a murmur of doubt. Why this ready acceptance? Simply because it is
impossible to explain what we see, feel, direct, and use, without a reasonable assumption as a starting point.
pg48-p4-s1: Everybody nowadays, believes in scores of assumptions for which there is good evidence, but no perfect visual proof.
pg48-p4-s2:
And
does not science demonstrate that visual proof is the weakest proof?
pg48-p4-s3:
It is being constantly revealed, as mankind studies
the material world, that outward appearances are not inward reality at all.
pg48-p4:
Everybody nowadays, believes in scores of assumptions for which there is good evidence, but no perfect visual proof. And
does not science demonstrate that visual proof is the weakest proof? It is being constantly revealed, as mankind studies
the material world, that outward appearances are not inward reality at all. To illustrate:
pg48-p5-s1: The prosaic steel girder is a mass of electrons whirling
pg48-p5: The prosaic steel girder is a mass of electrons whirling
